sentences.text: Thank you for calling the apartment company. If you know your party's extension you may dial it at any time for a company directory please press one for the accounting department press two Hr department press three for accounts payable press for tenant relations press five. If you have a maintenance emergency and are located out of California property press six, if you have a maintenance emergency and are located at and Nevada property press seven.
